auth.label: API Key
auth.description: lexoffice Public API key sent with the Authorization Bearer header. Create or view it in the lexoffice developer area: https://app.lexware.de/addons/public-api

actions.name: create_article
actions.description: Create one Lexoffice article with a NET or GROSS leading price payload.

gtin.description: The Global Trade Item Number of the article.

unitName.description: The unit name of the article.

netPrice.description: The net price of the article.

grossPrice.description: The gross price of the article.

taxRate.description: The article tax rate accepted by Lexoffice.

version.description: The article version used for optimistic locking.

data.description: The Lexoffice article payload used for creating or updating an article.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating a Lexoffice article.

createdDate.description: The RFC 3339 timestamp returned by Lexoffice.

updatedDate.description: The RFC 3339 timestamp returned by Lexoffice.

version.description: The latest version returned by Lexoffice.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when creating a Lexoffice article.

actions.name: create_contact
actions.description: Create one Lexoffice contact using either a company or person payload.

version.description: The optimistic-locking version. Use 0 for POST and the latest value for PUT.

customer.description: An empty role object expected by Lexoffice.

vendor.description: An empty role object expected by Lexoffice.

roles.description: The Lexoffice role payload used when creating or updating a contact.

allowTaxFreeInvoices.description: Whether tax-free invoices are allowed for this company.

taxNumber.description: The tax number of the company.

vatRegistrationId.description: The VAT registration ID of the company.

salutation.description: The salutation of the contact person.

firstName.description: The first name of the contact person.

lastName.description: The last name of the contact person.

primary.description: Whether the contact person is the primary contact.

emailAddress.description: The email address of the contact person.

phoneNumber.description: The phone number of the contact person.

items.description: A Lexoffice company contact person object.

contactPersons.description: The contact persons attached to the company.

company.description: The Lexoffice company object used for company contacts.

firstName.description: The first name of the person.

lastName.description: The last name of the person.

person.description: The Lexoffice person object used for private-person contacts.

items.description: A Lexoffice address payload used for billing or shipping addresses.
A Lexoffice address payload used for billing or shipping addresses.

addresses.description: The address collections attached to the contact.

vendorNumberAtCustomer.description: Your vendor number as used by the customer.

xRechnung.description: The XRechnung attributes attached to the contact.

emailAddresses.description: The categorized contact values grouped by Lexoffice field name.

phoneNumbers.description: The categorized phone numbers grouped by Lexoffice field name.

note.description: The optional contact note with a maximum length of 1000 characters.

data.description: The Lexoffice contact payload used for creating or updating a contact.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating a Lexoffice contact.

createdDate.description: The RFC 3339 timestamp returned by Lexoffice.

updatedDate.description: The RFC 3339 timestamp returned by Lexoffice.

version.description: The latest version returned by Lexoffice.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when creating a Lexoffice contact.

actions.name: get_article
actions.description: Retrieve one Lexoffice article by ID.

gtin.description: The Global Trade Item Number of the article.

unitName.description: The unit name of the article.

netPrice.description: The net price of the article.

grossPrice.description: The gross price of the article.

taxRate.description: The article tax rate accepted by Lexoffice.

version.description: The article version used for optimistic locking.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when retrieving one Lexoffice article.

actions.name: get_contact
actions.description: Retrieve one Lexoffice contact by ID.

version.description: The contact version used for optimistic locking.

customer.description: The customer role details returned by Lexoffice.

vendor.description: The vendor role details returned by Lexoffice.

roles.description: The Lexoffice roles object. Each present key activates the corresponding role.

allowTaxFreeInvoices.description: Whether tax-free invoices are allowed for this company.

taxNumber.description: The tax number of the company.

vatRegistrationId.description: The VAT registration ID of the company.

salutation.description: The salutation of the contact person.

firstName.description: The first name of the contact person.

lastName.description: The last name of the contact person.

primary.description: Whether the contact person is the primary contact.

emailAddress.description: The email address of the contact person.

phoneNumber.description: The phone number of the contact person.

items.description: A Lexoffice company contact person object.

contactPersons.description: The contact persons attached to the company.

company.description: The Lexoffice company object used for company contacts.

firstName.description: The first name of the person.

lastName.description: The last name of the person.

person.description: The Lexoffice person object used for private-person contacts.

items.description: A Lexoffice address payload used for billing or shipping addresses.
A Lexoffice address payload used for billing or shipping addresses.

addresses.description: The address collections attached to the contact.

vendorNumberAtCustomer.description: Your vendor number as used by the customer.

xRechnung.description: The XRechnung attributes attached to the contact.

emailAddresses.description: The categorized contact values grouped by Lexoffice field name.

phoneNumbers.description: The categorized phone numbers grouped by Lexoffice field name.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when retrieving one Lexoffice contact.

actions.name: get_profile
actions.description: Retrieve the current Lexoffice connection profile and organization metadata.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving the current Lexoffice profile.

companyName.description: The organization name registered at Lexoffice.

userName.description: The Lexoffice user who created the connection.

userEmail.description: The email address of the Lexoffice user.

date.description: The RFC 3339 timestamp returned by Lexoffice.

created.description: The metadata about the established Lexoffice connection.

features.description: The product features returned by Lexoffice.

businessFeatures.description: The business features returned by Lexoffice.

subscriptionStatus.description: The subscription status returned by Lexoffice.

taxType.description: The configured tax type of the organization.

smallBusiness.description: Whether the organization is marked as a small business.

outputSchema.description: The Lexoffice profile object returned by GET /v1/profile.

actions.name: list_articles
actions.description: List Lexoffice articles with optional articleNumber, GTIN, or type filters.

size.description: The page size to request. Lexoffice allows up to 250.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Lexoffice articles.

gtin.description: The Global Trade Item Number of the article.

unitName.description: The unit name of the article.

netPrice.description: The net price of the article.

grossPrice.description: The gross price of the article.

taxRate.description: The article tax rate accepted by Lexoffice.

version.description: The article version used for optimistic locking.

content.description: The articles returned by the current page.

totalPages.description: The total number of available pages.

totalElements.description: The total number of matching records.

last.description: Whether this is the last page.

direction.description: The sort direction returned by Lexoffice.

ascending.description: Whether the sort order is ascending.

sort.description: The sort specification returned by Lexoffice.

size.description: The page size returned by Lexoffice.

first.description: Whether this is the first page.

numberOfElements.description: The number of elements in the current page.

actions.name: list_contacts
actions.description: List Lexoffice contacts with optional filters and page navigation.

email.description: Filter contacts by email with Lexoffice substring semantics.

name.description: Filter contacts by name with Lexoffice substring semantics.

number.description: Filter contacts by customer or vendor number.

size.description: The page size to request. Lexoffice allows up to 250.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Lexoffice contacts.

version.description: The contact version used for optimistic locking.

customer.description: The customer role details returned by Lexoffice.

vendor.description: The vendor role details returned by Lexoffice.

roles.description: The Lexoffice roles object. Each present key activates the corresponding role.

lastName.description: The last name of the person.

actions.name: list_voucherlist
actions.description: List Lexoffice voucher metadata using the official voucherlist filters and paging.

voucherType.description: A comma-separated Lexoffice voucher type list, or the value any.

voucherStatus.description: A comma-separated Lexoffice voucher status list, or the value any.

archived.description: Whether archived vouchers should be returned.

voucherDateFrom.description: The date value in YYYY-MM-DD format.

voucherDateTo.description: The date value in YYYY-MM-DD format.

createdDateFrom.description: The date value in YYYY-MM-DD format.

createdDateTo.description: The date value in YYYY-MM-DD format.

updatedDateFrom.description: The date value in YYYY-MM-DD format.

updatedDateTo.description: The date value in YYYY-MM-DD format.

size.description: The page size to request. Lexoffice allows up to 250.

sort.description: The Lexoffice sort expression such as voucherDate,DESC or updatedDate,ASC.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Lexoffice voucher metadata.

voucherDate.description: The RFC 3339 timestamp returned by Lexoffice.

createdDate.description: The RFC 3339 timestamp returned by Lexoffice.

updatedDate.description: The RFC 3339 timestamp returned by Lexoffice.

anyOf.description: The due date timestamp returned by Lexoffice.
The currently open amount of the voucher.

items.description: A voucher summary returned by the Lexoffice voucherlist endpoint.

content.description: The vouchers returned by the current page.

totalPages.description: The total number of available pages.

totalElements.description: The total number of matching records.

last.description: Whether this is the last page.

direction.description: The sort direction returned by Lexoffice.

ascending.description: Whether the sort order is ascending.

sort.description: The sort specification returned by Lexoffice.

size.description: The page size returned by Lexoffice.

first.description: Whether this is the first page.

numberOfElements.description: The number of elements in the current page.

actions.name: update_article
actions.description: Update one Lexoffice article by ID using the latest optimistic-locking version.

gtin.description: The Global Trade Item Number of the article.

unitName.description: The unit name of the article.

netPrice.description: The net price of the article.

grossPrice.description: The gross price of the article.

version.description: The article version used for optimistic locking.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for updating a Lexoffice article.

createdDate.description: The RFC 3339 timestamp returned by Lexoffice.

updatedDate.description: The RFC 3339 timestamp returned by Lexoffice.

version.description: The latest version returned by Lexoffice.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when updating a Lexoffice article.
